# Cafes In Toronto
> A curated directory of the best independent coffee shops in Toronto, Canada. Each listing includes hours, address, Google rating, tags for working/dates/meetups, and wifi info.

## Homepage
https://cafesintoronto.com/

## Neighbourhoods
https://cafesintoronto.com/the-annex/
https://cafesintoronto.com/kensington-market/
https://cafesintoronto.com/ossington/
https://cafesintoronto.com/king-west/
https://cafesintoronto.com/queen-west/
https://cafesintoronto.com/downtown-toronto/
https://cafesintoronto.com/chinatown/
https://cafesintoronto.com/distillery/
https://cafesintoronto.com/yorkville/
https://cafesintoronto.com/liberty-village/
